message.content:
Subject: Formal Complaint: Damaged and Delayed Order #[Order Number]

Dear [Customer Service Name or "Customer Support Team"],

I am writing to formally express my dissatisfaction with the recent delivery of my order, #[Order Number], which was placed on [Date of Purchase].

Unfortunately, the package arrived on [Date of Delivery], which is approximately two weeks later than the estimated delivery date of [Estimated Delivery Date]. Furthermore, upon opening the package, I discovered that the contents were significantly damaged. Specifically, [describe the damage in detail, e.g., the outer box was crushed, the item inside was cracked, or the packaging was torn open].

This situation has caused considerable inconvenience, as I had relied on the timely arrival of this item for [briefly explain reason, e.g., a gift, a work deadline, or personal use]. The combination of the excessive delay and the poor condition in which the item arrived suggests a lack of care in both shipping and handling.

To resolve this matter, I request one of the following remedies:
1. A full refund of the purchase price, including shipping costs; or
2. An immediate replacement sent via expedited shipping at no additional cost.

I have attached photographs of the damaged packaging and the item itself for your reference. I also recommend reviewing the tracking information, which confirms the delivery date.

I expect a response regarding this complaint within [e.g., 5-7 business days]. I have been a loyal customer of [Company Name] for [number] years and hope to resolve this issue amicably and promptly.

Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Email Address]
[Your Mailing Address, if required for returns]

**Attachments:**
- Photo 1: Damaged outer packaging
-
